title: Question about 10
wikitext:
[]: Question about 1.0... Post by The Goose » Tue Jul 21, 2009 11:32 pm In the first Rebuild film, the eva geeks wiki said that Shinji decides to pilot the Eva to save Rei. So, without having to re-watch the first episode, what made Shinji pilot Unit-01 in the original series?

[]: Post by Eva 04 » Tue Jul 21, 2009 11:36 pm I'd say pretty much the same reason.Although after beating the 10th angel in the series,that changes to piloting to get praised by his father.

[]: Post by Baz » Tue Jul 21, 2009 11:36 pm It was still Rei. The scene was exactly the same, except that in the episode, the lights fell on Shinji and were blocked by Unit 01.

[]: Post by Iron Rooster » Tue Jul 21, 2009 11:37 pm Shinji was told to, but he didn't but then Gendo had Rei (who was injured) wheeled out to pilot. Essentially it was the same guilt trip that motivated him. Anyway, I'm going to be nice about this. I forgot why too, but the Wiki on this site is a great resource for basic plot questions. So, yeah, I hope I post this before someone is an ass and says "u shuda wached it oar lohked it uhp".

[]: Post by Soul Fire » Tue Jul 21, 2009 11:39 pm It was exactly the same situation. Shinji saw Rei fall off the hospital bed and saw her wounds and then decided that he mustn't run away. The only remarkable difference in that scene was where Unit 1 moves by itself to protect Shinji from falling debris if I rememeber rightly. Unit 1 doesnt move at all in rebuild.

[]: Post by schismatics » Tue Jul 21, 2009 11:43 pm Soul Fire wrote: The only remarkable difference in that scene was where Unit 1 moves by itself to protect Shinji from falling debris if I rememeber rightly. Unit 1 doesnt move at all in rebuild.

[]: Post by The Goose » Tue Jul 21, 2009 11:45 pm I guess that bit of info, from the wiki, of the scene being changed for the film should be deleted. Thanks for the answers, guys!

[]: Post by Ba
